title: wedelia greenmanii
intro: Wedelia greenmanii, also known as Wedelia or Mexican daisy, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Wedelia greenmanii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Wedelia greenmanii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
